name: webclip-search
description: WebClipファイルを検索するMCPサーバ
long_description: WebClipで保存したMarkdownファイルを、日付・URL・全文・セマンティック類似度で検索します。frontmatter のメタデータ（title, source/url, created/clip_dateなど）も参照します。

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List all WebClip files with their metadata

tools.name: search_by_date
tools.description: Search WebClip files by creation date range

tools.name: search_by_source
tools.description: Search WebClip files by source URL (partial match)

tools.name: get_contents
tools.description: Get the content of a WebClip file (frontmatter + truncated body)

tools.name: search_fulltext
tools.description: Search WebClip files by text in the body content (partial match, case-insensitive)

tools.name: search_semantic
tools.description: Search WebClip files by semantic similarity to the query

tools.name: index_status
tools.description: Show semantic index statistics and frontmatter coverage

tools.name: remove_contents
tools.description: Permanently delete a WebClip file by filename

tools.name: remove_contents_by_date
tools.description: Permanently delete WebClip files by creation date range

webclip_dir.title: WebClip Directory
webclip_dir.description: WebClipファイルが保存されているディレクトリ
